# Asset Sources And Licenses

All files in the current shortlist are from CC0 sources. Attribution is not required, but source records are retained for provenance.

## Art

- Assorted Pixel Art by XpBarq (CC0)
  - https://xpbarq.itch.io/assorted-pixel-art-tilesets
- Extraordinary Pixelvania by Kijosoft and Azagaya (CC0)
  - https://kijosoft.itch.io/extraordinary-pixelvania
- Pixel art sword slash effect by tbbk (CC0)
  - https://opengameart.org/content/pixel-art-sword-slash-effect
- Industrial Parallax Background by Luis Zuno / ansimuz (CC0)
  - https://lpc.opengameart.org/content/industrial-parallax-background
- Particle Pack by Kenney (CC0)
  - https://www.kenney.nl/assets/particle-pack

## Audio

- Impact Sounds by Kenney (CC0)
  - https://www.kenney.nl/assets/impact-sounds
- RPG Audio by Kenney (CC0)
  - https://www.kenney.nl/assets/rpg-audio
- Sci-fi Sounds by Kenney (CC0)
  - https://www.kenney.nl/assets/sci-fi-sounds
- UI Audio by Kenney (CC0)
  - https://www.kenney.nl/assets/ui-audio

## Local License Copies

The original license and README files are preserved beside this document in `03_REFERENCE_LICENSES`.
